title: felicia deserti
intro: Felicia deserti, also known as the Blue Felicia, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving congestion, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The Blue Felicia is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
